ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., CSP.MI) */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the day */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the day */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the day */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the day */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., CSP.MI) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the company belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_ingestion" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data ingestion from this source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_daily" (
  "daily_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily price record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the day */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the day */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("daily_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_daily_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_daily_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_weekly" (
  "weekly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekly price record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the week */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the week */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the week */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the week */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the week */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weekly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_weekly_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_weekly_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_monthly" (
  "monthly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly price record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the month */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the month */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the month */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the month */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the month */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monthly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_monthly_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_monthly_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of data feed (e.g., real-time, delayed) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feed (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value of the alert (e.g., price threshold) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution or action taken after the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "key" TEXT /* Metadata key */,
  "value" TEXT /* Metadata value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "score" REAL /* Data quality score */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the quality check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality check was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)
